theme: PhantomPlay catalog restore and responsive browser proof

findings.expected: Penalty Kick remains active and featured in the frontend and server catalogs.
findings.actual: Before this sweep the frontend row had active:false and both catalogs had featured:false.

findings.journey: separate PhantomForce and ChicagoShots users and organizations
findings.expected: Safe local Postgres fixture can run DB-auth browser proof.
findings.actual: Docker Desktop Linux engine was not running, so the Postgres fixture could not start.

findings.routeOrComponent: responsive app shell and key modules
findings.expected: No horizontal overflow or clipped visible controls across required widths.
findings.actual: 42 responsive browser cases passed across Dashboard, Clients, Media Lab, Content Hub, Analytics, PhantomPlay, and Settings.

nextCycle: Run DB-auth org isolation when Docker/Postgres is available; otherwise add interaction-level responsive browser checks for Media Lab, PhantomPlay launch/resume, Settings forms, and Content Hub editor controls.
